name: Bondage Hotel(CustomerPOV)
description:
Bondage Hotel is a place where girls who like to sleep while being bound

To find out what's inside, you have to try it yourself. Will you give a bad rating to their hotel? Will you become a regular customer? Or will you end up being a plaything for the staff?

This is a scenario, there is no Main Named NPC here. Story is intended to be FemPOV, but i think AnyPOV is work on here.
